calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar May-10-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Francisco Gutierrez for and with Ana Silvia Guevara Campos-Sazo
The interpreter stated for the record: His name is Daniel Navarro. His Certification Number is 300802. The language to be interpreted is Spanish to English and English to Spanish.

Patricia Hewlett in propria persona

The Court noted that Ms. Hewlett filed two peremptory challenges, that she can only file one, the Court accepted the challenge as to Judge Peter Busch. The Court also noted the CCP 170.1 challenge for cause was not properly served, was identical to the one filed before, which was denied because it did not set forth any facts. The Court informed Ms. Hewlett that she has no standing in this matter and no interest in this Trust, that the property was transferred to Ms. Campos in 2002, and that her objections are overruled. Ms. Hewlett stated that she will re-file a peremptory challenge, that Mr. Solorzano is the sole owner of the property, and that he signed a declaration in 2017. Mr. Gutierrez stated that the transfer was between 2 married people in 2002, that the deed was recorded, that he filed this petition because they need someone to help manage the property, and he has obtained a title guarantee, and made reference to the proposed order. The Court directed Counsel to file the Title Guarantee, and stated that the order should provide the settlor's interest in the property go into the Trust. The Court granted the petition for order confirming trust assets (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-10-2018 Continued To Apr-30-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REQUEST FOR HEARING ABOUT COURT FEE WAIVER ORDER
Off Calendar Apr-06-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patricia Hewlett

Hearing held. Ms. Hewlett provided the court with her 2017 W-2s and pay stubs for review. The Court verbally voir dires Ms. Hewlett and questions her about her current address and why 2017 tax returns are not submitted. After reviewing the documents and hearing oral argument, The Court takes the request for fee waiver under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le, Nancy Bautista. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
